function.name: _create_informat_script_directory
function.description: Create Informat script directory. This method is always called before _save_informat_script. If a parent directory exists, pass parentId, otherwise do not pass. return: Returns the created folder id. When creating script files later, if the file belongs to this directory, carry this id as parentId. After calling this method, you need to call _query_informat_script_list again

name.description: Folder name, such as tools, folder names cannot be duplicated

parentId.description: Parent directory id, can be omitted if none
